crie.title: Administration
crie.reconciliation: R-02 (Administration = WF-005; WF-004 is Output Generation)
crie.boundary: R-17: WF-005 produces/refreshes DASHBOARD DATA only. It renders NO UI. Dashboards are the admin.* views surfaced by the external BI tool.
crie.license: All Rights Reserved, Copyright (c) 2026 Dawod Manasra.

nodes.name: Schedule Trigger
nodes.notes: §157 WF-005 runs on schedule. Cron is config-driven (config/admin.config.yaml -> schedule.cron); NO hardcoded cadence (Principle 7).

nodes.name: Initialize
nodes.notes: §159 Standard Workflow Pattern: Trigger -> Initialize -> ... Correlation ID per SW-001.

nodes.name: SW-027 Telemetry (open span)
nodes.notes: §267 SW-027 Telemetry Collector: opens a telemetry span for the admin run.

nodes.name: Health Checks (SW-019 fan-out)
nodes.notes: §142/§568 Health Center. Probes each service (n8n, Supabase, Google Drive, Azure OCR, OpenAI, Claude, Embeddings, Storage, Queue System, Repository), writes monitoring.health_checks. R-18: updates breaker_state (Closed/Open/HalfOpen) from failure_count vs §387 threshold; a HalfOpen recovery probe transitions back to Closed. Provider list & thresholds are config-driven.

nodes.name: Repository Health (§528)
nodes.notes: §528 Repository Health Score 0-100 recomputed; §231 lightweight DB function. Business logic remains in n8n where composite; DB function is thin.

nodes.name: Repository Analytics (§533/§560)
nodes.notes: §529/§533 statistics + §560 analytics feed admin.vw_repository_dashboard / admin.vw_knowledge_analytics. Views are read-only projections; this node refreshes the underlying source data.

nodes.name: Cost Report (§198/§564)
nodes.notes: §198 cost monitoring / §564 cost intelligence. Reads the cost view to emit the scheduled Cost Report artifact (Export Center §575).

nodes.name: Benchmark Execution (§385)
nodes.notes: §385 Benchmark Execution. Sprint 8 SCHEDULES benchmark runs and surfaces results in admin.vw_benchmark_dashboard (§565). Full benchmark SUITE definition and numeric target validation is Sprint 9 scope (§196/§390-406) and is NOT implemented here — this node only triggers the existing runner and records results. Targets are configurable (§565).

nodes.name: Config Validation (§327, S8-9)
nodes.notes: §327 Configuration Validation, run on schedule (S8-9). Reuses the Startup Validation workflow (UT-000, R-14) checks: required values, URLs valid, credentials available, providers enabled, models configured, feature flags valid. Findings -> alerts.

nodes.name: Prompt Validation (§157, S8-9)
nodes.notes: §157 Prompt Validation on schedule (S8-9). Verifies PR-001..PR-008 present, versioned (§174), status active, and output-contract-valid via SW-018 Output Validator. Findings -> alerts. No prompt bodies embedded (§608/§612).

nodes.name: Evaluate Alert Thresholds (§387/§569)
nodes.notes: §387/§569. Emits alert rows (severity required). Thresholds configurable; NO hardcoded values (Principle 7).

nodes.name: Persist Alerts

parameters.columns: alert_type, severity, source, message, context, correlation_id

nodes.notes: Writes to monitoring.alerts (migration 0026). admin.vw_alert_center surfaces them in the BI tool (§569, R-17).

nodes.name: SW-028 Notification
nodes.notes: §268 SW-028. Dispatches Email now; Slack/Teams reserved (future). Triggered on Workflow Failure / Human Review / Repository Certification Failure and on Critical alerts. Providers reached through the Provider Adapter layer.

nodes.name: SW-026 Execution Logger
nodes.notes: §266 SW-026: writes Workflow Log / AI Log / Performance Log / Audit Log for this admin run. Audit Log lands in immutable audit.* (§230/0023).

nodes.name: SW-027 Telemetry (close span)
nodes.notes: §267 SW-027 closes the telemetry span: runtime, tokens, cost, provider, model, retry count, success.
